description: Air defense target library for EO C2 demonstrator. RCS in m², IR emission in W/sr, speed in m/s, altitude in meters.

targets.name: Scud-B (R-17 Elbrus)
targets.description: Soviet short-range tactical ballistic missile, 300 km range. Widely exported to Syria and other Middle East states.

targets.name: Scud-C (Hwasong-6)
targets.description: Extended-range Scud variant, 600 km range. Reduced payload for greater range.

targets.name: Fateh-110
targets.description: Iranian solid-fuel SRBM with GPS/INS guidance, 300 km range. Hezbollah inventory.

targets.name: Shahab-3
targets.description: Iranian MRBM derived from Nodong-1, 1300 km range. Can reach Israel from Iran.

targets.name: Qiam-1
targets.description: Iranian finless SRBM, improved Shahab-2 derivative, 800 km range. Used in January 2020 strikes.

targets.name: Zelzal-2
targets.description: Iranian heavy artillery rocket / short-range ballistic, 210 km range. Unguided.

targets.name: Fajr-5
targets.description: Iranian long-range artillery rocket, 75 km range. Used by Hamas and Hezbollah.

targets.name: M-302 (Khaibar-1)
targets.description: Syrian-manufactured long-range rocket, 180 km range. Seized on Klos-C vessel 2014.

targets.name: Iskander-M (SS-26 Stone)
targets.description: Russian quasi-ballistic SRBM with terminal maneuver, 500 km range. Highly accurate.

targets.name: DF-15 (CSS-6)
targets.description: Chinese solid-fuel SRBM, 600 km range. Reference threat for export variants.

targets.name: Emad
targets.description: Iranian guided MRBM, improved Shahab-3 with maneuvering reentry vehicle, 1700 km range.

targets.name: Zolfaghar
targets.description: Iranian solid-fuel SRBM, 700 km range. Used in 2017 strikes against ISIS in Syria.

targets.name: Shahed-136 (Geran-2)
targets.description: Iranian one-way attack drone (loitering munition), delta-wing, 2500 km range. Mass-produced.

targets.name: Mohajer-6
targets.description: Iranian armed reconnaissance UCAV, carries Qaem PGMs. 200 km operational radius.

targets.name: IAI Harop
targets.description: Israeli loitering munition / anti-radiation drone. Reference friendly asset for RCS modeling.

targets.name: Kh-55 (AS-15 Kent)
targets.description: Soviet/Russian air-launched cruise missile, 2500 km range. Turbofan-powered, terrain-following.

targets.name: Soumar
targets.description: Iranian ground-launched cruise missile, reverse-engineered Kh-55. 2000+ km range.

targets.name: Quds-1
targets.description: Houthi/Iranian small turbojet cruise missile. Used in Aramco 2019 attack. Very low altitude.

targets.name: Samad-3
targets.description: Houthi long-range attack drone, twin-boom pusher, 1500+ km range.

targets.name: Ababil-3
targets.description: Iranian small reconnaissance/attack drone with onboard camera. Hezbollah inventory.

targets.name: Karrar
targets.description: Iranian jet-powered UCAV, can carry weapons. Derived from target drone design.

targets.name: Hoveizeh
targets.description: Iranian long-range cruise missile, 1350 km range. Unveiled 2019.

targets.name: Shahed-129
targets.description: Iranian MALE UCAV, 24-hr endurance, carries Sadid PGMs. Predator-class.

targets.name: Su-35S Flanker-E
targets.description: Russian 4++ generation air superiority fighter. Supermaneuverability, Irbis-E PESA radar.

targets.name: MiG-29A Fulcrum
targets.description: Soviet lightweight air superiority fighter. Syrian Air Force inventory.

targets.name: F-16C Fighting Falcon
targets.description: Multi-role fighter, backbone of Israeli Air Force (Barak/Sufa). Block 40/50.

targets.name: F-15I Ra'am
targets.description: Israeli Strike Eagle variant, long-range strike fighter. Conformal fuel tanks.

targets.name: Mirage 2000-5
targets.description: French delta-wing multirole fighter. Operated by several Middle East air forces.

targets.name: Su-24M Fencer
targets.description: Soviet variable-geometry strike aircraft. Syrian Air Force bomber, low-level penetration.

targets.name: MiG-25RB Foxbat
targets.description: Soviet high-speed reconnaissance/interceptor. Mach 2.8+, extreme altitude.

targets.name: Su-22M4 Fitter
targets.description: Soviet variable-geometry ground attack fighter. Syrian Air Force inventory.

targets.name: F-4E Phantom II
targets.description: Legacy twin-engine fighter-bomber. Still operated by Iran (upgraded Kurnass).

targets.name: Rafale C
targets.description: French omnirole fighter. Low RCS design, Spectra EW suite.

targets.name: F-35I Adir
targets.description: Israeli 5th-gen stealth fighter. Israeli-specific EW and C2 modifications.

targets.name: Mi-24V Hind
targets.description: Soviet gunship/transport helicopter. Syrian Air Force attack helicopter.

targets.name: AH-64D Saraf
targets.description: Israeli Apache Longbow variant. Primary IDF attack helicopter.

targets.name: Ka-52 Alligator
targets.description: Russian coaxial-rotor attack helicopter. Advanced avionics, night-capable.

targets.name: Mi-8/Mi-17 Hip
targets.description: Soviet medium utility helicopter. Ubiquitous in Middle East military forces.

targets.name: Bell 412EP
targets.description: Medium twin-engine utility helicopter. Used by multiple Middle East militaries.

targets.name: S-70A Yanshuf
targets.description: Israeli Black Hawk variant. Multi-mission utility helicopter.

targets.name: Boeing 737-800
targets.description: Narrow-body commercial airliner. Most common type in Middle East civil aviation.

targets.name: Airbus A320
targets.description: Narrow-body commercial airliner. High-density regional routes.

targets.name: Cessna 172 Skyhawk
targets.description: Single-engine light aircraft. Flight training and general aviation.

targets.name: Embraer E175
targets.description: Regional jet, 78-seat capacity. Common on short-haul routes.

targets.name: Beechcraft King Air 350
targets.description: Twin turboprop utility aircraft. Often used for ISR and medevac roles.

targets.name: Boeing 747-400
targets.description: Wide-body commercial airliner. Very large radar cross-section.

targets.name: C-130J Super Hercules
targets.description: Four-engine turboprop tactical airlifter. IAF Karnaf squadron workhorse.

targets.name: Il-76MD Candid
targets.description: Soviet heavy strategic airlifter. Syrian/Iranian military transport backbone.

targets.name: C-17 Globemaster III
targets.description: US strategic/tactical airlifter. Common in CENTCOM theater operations.

targets.name: An-26 Curl
targets.description: Soviet light tactical transport. Syrian Air Force logistics aircraft.

targets.name: CH-47F Chinook
targets.description: Heavy-lift tandem-rotor helicopter. US/allied forces theater transport.

targets.name: KC-135 Stratotanker
targets.description: Aerial refueling tanker. Frequently operates in Middle East theater.
